module.title: The Arena of Testing
module.author: System Test Module
module.setting: A mysterious combat arena designed to test adventurers' skills
module.tone: straightforward, focused on testing game systems
module.description: Streamlined 3-room dungeon focused on testing combat mechanics, character panel updates, HP tracking, XP awards, item usage, and death scenarios

entry_hall.name: The Entry Hall
entry_hall.description: Safe starting room with clear navigation and tutorial info

features.name: Pedestal Note
features.description: A crisp parchment resting on a stone pedestal
features.text: Welcome, warrior. Three trials await: TRAINING (north) tests your fundamentals. CHALLENGE (east) tests your endurance. The FINAL TEST (south) awaits when you are ready. May fortune favor you.

features.name: Ever-burning Torches
features.note: Light is abundant here - no need to track torch duration in this arena

features.name: Supply Chest
features.description: An unlocked chest near the entrance

entry_hall.atmosphere: Clean, well-lit, almost clinical. This place exists to test, not to kill.
entry_hall.gm_notes: Safe room. Let player read note, explore, and prepare. Emphasize they can return here between trials.

training_room.name: The Training Room
training_room.description: BASIC COMBAT TEST - Tests attack rolls, damage, HP tracking, death, XP award

features.name: Weapon Racks
features.description: Dulled training weapons mounted on the walls
features.note: These are for practice - your real weapons are sharper

features.name: Training Dummies
features.note: You could attack these for practice, but they don't fight back

encounters.name: Goblin Warrior
encounters.behavior: The goblin notices you immediately and readies its scimitar. It will fight to the death - this is a test, after all.
encounters.tactics: Straightforward melee combat. Tests basic attack/damage/HP mechanics.

on_death.narrative: The goblin falls, its body dissolving into mist. A small pouch of coins materializes where it stood.

encounters.special_notes: This goblin won't flee or use tactics - it exists to test basic combat

training_room.atmosphere: Spartan and practical. This is about testing fundamentals.
training_room.gm_notes: SIMPLE COMBAT. Goblin has 7 HP, AC 13, +4 to hit for 1d6+2 damage. Award 25 XP on death. Test: Does HP update? Does XP award work? Does gold get added?

challenge_chamber.name: The Challenge Chamber
challenge_chamber.description: TOUGH COMBAT TEST - Tests sustained combat, healing, item usage, conditions

features.name: Glowing Runes
features.description: Magical inscriptions around the platform's edge
features.success: The runes are binding magic - the guardian cannot leave the platform, but draws power from it.
features.failure: The symbols are too complex to decipher quickly.

features.name: Stone Platform
features.description: Raised dais where the guardian stands
features.note: You must climb onto the platform to engage the guardian

encounters.name: Tomb Guardian
encounters.behavior: The guardian does not speak. It simply raises its blade and advances with methodical precision.
encounters.tactics: Fights intelligently. Uses the platform terrain. Will test player's ability to manage HP, use healing potions, and handle sustained combat.

on_half_hp.narrative: The guardian staggers, ancient armor cracking. But it fights on with grim determination.

on_death.narrative: The guardian's armor shatters, releasing a pulse of energy. Its form dissolves, leaving behind a gleaming weapon and a small fortune in ancient coins.

treasure.description: A perfectly balanced blade with an ancient maker's mark

encounters.special_notes: Guardian has 22 HP, AC 15, +5 to hit for 1d8+3. This should challenge a level 3 fighter and force them to use resources (potions, Second Wind, etc.)

challenge_chamber.atmosphere: Tense and dangerous. This is a real fight.
challenge_chamber.gm_notes: TOUGH COMBAT. Test: HP tracking over multiple rounds, using healing items, equipment switching (maybe ranged attack?), managing resources. Guardian hits hard but predictably.

boss_arena.name: The Final Arena
boss_arena.description: COMPLEX COMBAT TEST - Tests necrotic damage, HP maximum reduction, death scenario, conditions

features.name: Spectral Torches
features.description: Ghostly flames that provide light but no warmth
features.note: The wraith seems uncomfortable near the brightest torches

features.name: Exit Portal
features.description: A shimmering gateway on the far side of the arena
features.note: The portal is sealed until the wraith is defeated

encounters.name: Shadow Wraith
encounters.behavior: The wraith circles you like a predator, its hollow eyes fixed on your life force. It attacks without warning.
encounters.tactics: Uses Life Drain (2d6+2 necrotic, reduces max HP). Hides in shadows between attacks. Tests player managing reduced max HP and dangerous conditions.

on_half_hp.narrative: The wraith shrieks, its form becoming more unstable. It fights with desperate hunger.

on_death.narrative: The wraith lets out an unearthly wail as it dissipates into nothingness. The oppressive cold lifts. The exit portal flares to life, and a chest materializes where the wraith stood.

treasure.description: A silver amulet that pulses with protective magic

on_death.special: Any HP maximum reduction from Life Drain is removed upon defeating the wraith

encounters.special_notes: Wraith has 16 HP, AC 12, +4 to hit for 2d6+2 necrotic. Life Drain reduces target's max HP. This tests: necrotic damage, max HP reduction, potentially character death if they're wounded.

boss_arena.atmosphere: Dark and threatening. Death is a real possibility here.
boss_arena.gm_notes: BOSS FIGHT. This can kill the player if they're not careful. Life Drain is dangerous - reducing max HP means healing is less effective. Test: Death scenario, max HP reduction mechanics, condition tracking, high-stakes combat.

victory_chamber.name: Chamber of Victory
victory_chamber.description: Success state - safe room to rest and exit

features.name: Rest Area
features.effect: Full heal, restore all abilities, remove all conditions
features.note: You may take a long rest here safely

features.name: Victory Inscription
features.description: Golden words etched above the exit
features.text: Well fought, warrior. You have proven yourself. The door leads onward - to new adventures.

victory_chamber.atmosphere: Peaceful, victorious. You've earned this rest.
victory_chamber.gm_notes: Safe ending. Player can rest, heal, and exit. Module complete.

victory_conditions: Defeat all three encounters (goblin, tomb guardian, shadow wraith)

suggested_test_sequence: 1. Enter, read note, get potions from chest - TEST: Inventory adds
2. Fight goblin - TEST: Basic combat, HP/XP/gold tracking
3. Return to entry hall, verify updates
4. Fight tomb guardian - TEST: Sustained combat, healing potion use, harder enemy
5. Verify HP healed, potion removed from inventory, XP awarded, treasure added
6. OPTIONAL: Fight wraith - TEST: Death scenario (if player is low HP), max HP reduction, necrotic damage
7. Victory chamber - TEST: Long rest healing, condition removal

expected_outcomes.after_goblin: Player should have: -5 to -8 HP, +25 XP, +10 gold
expected_outcomes.after_guardian: Player should have: -15 to -25 total HP damage, +100 XP, +50 gold, new sword
expected_outcomes.after_wraith: Player may be near death or reduced max HP, +120 XP, +100 gold, amulet

failure_scenarios_to_test: Player tries to fight all three in sequence without rest
Player dies to wraith (test death handling)
